title: Buttery Roasted Tofu Wrap with Corn Tortillas
description: A buttery, dense Australian dish featuring roasted tofu wrapped in crispy corn tortillas, perfect for a brunch mood that's high-protein-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1 can (14 oz/400g) organic drained and rinsed chickpeas
1 block (156g) extra-firm tofu, pressed to remove excess moisture
1 cup corn tortillas, warmed and torn into bite-sized pieces
Fresh herbs (parsley or cilantro) for garnish

instructions: In a large bowl, mix chickpeas, garlic, red onion, lemon juice, and salt. Mix well until the ingredients are evenly distributed.
Press tofu on paper towels for 20 minutes; drain excess water. Crumble tofu into the vegetable mixture.

Heat butter in an oven-safe skillet over medium heat. Add crumbled tofu mix to skillet, spread out evenly, and sprinkle with a pinch of salt and pepper. Cook until golden brown and crisp, about 15 minutes.
Transfer tofu wrap mixture onto warmed corn tortillas. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
Serve hot as a breakfast dish or for lunch.
Optional: Serve alongside avocado spread or a side salad to complete the meal.
